Transportation: Patient declines to respond (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents that at the time of discharge the patient declined to respond to the question regarding lack of transportation. 0 = No
1 = Yes
443 CRNT_MDCTN_LST_PRVDR_CD CRNT_MDCTN_LST_PRVDR_CD Current Reconciled Medication List - Provider CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge to another provider, the current facility provided the patient’s current reconciled medication list to the subsequent provider. 0 =
